zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
Solana/美元整体维持震荡偏强结构，价格在78美元附近高位整理，短线波动收窄但重心略有上移。当前市场缺乏明确方向突破，多空在窄区间内反复博弈，趋势仍以整理为主但偏多。

从指标看，价格稳站SMA20（77.30）之上，中期均线支撑有效，结构偏多。MACD维持正值动能，显示多头仍占优势，但RSI缺失导致超买强度难以进一步确认，动能延续性有限。

支撑位关注77.80与77.30一线，该区域为短线多头防守关键；上方阻力集中在78.30及79.00附近，若有效突破79美元，有望打开新一轮短线上行空间并强化趋势延续。

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，靠近支撑可轻仓低吸，接近阻力逐步止盈。当前不宜追涨，需等待放量突破确认方向后再顺势跟随，以提升胜率并控制回撤风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation structure around 78.23, with price action compressing into a narrow intraday range between 77.84 and 78.31 The market has shown minimal directional volatility over the past 24 hours, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers Despite the muted movement, price continues to hold above recent session lows, indicating a subtle bullish undertone rather than bearish pressure.

Momentum indicators suggest a cautiously bullish bias The MACD reading at 0.878 confirms positive trend strength, although the absence of a visible signal line limits crossover confirmation Price trading above the SMA(20) at 77.3055 reinforces short-term strength and buyer control With RSI(14) unavailable momentum confirmation relies primarily on MACD and moving average positioning both currently favoring mild upward continuation rather than reversal.

Immediate support is located near 77.84, aligning with the recent intraday low, while a stronger structural base sits around the SMA(20) at 77.3055 A breakdown below this zone could expose deeper consolidation levels On the upside, resistance is currently defined by 78.31, the session high, with a potential extension target near the psychological 79.00 level if momentum accelerates beyond current range boundaries.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy with selective breakout positioning Traders may consider buying dips near 77.80 to 77.30 support zone while targeting partial exits near 78.30 resistance A confirmed breakout above 78.31 could signal continuation toward 79.00, but requires volume validation Risk management remains essential with protective stops placed below 77.30 to guard against sudden downside expansion in the current low-volatility environment.
